title: The Century Report: March 25, 2026
description:
A federal judge told the Pentagon its supply-chain risk designation of Anthropic "looks like an attempt to cripple" the company, Arm held up its first self-produced chip for the agentic AI era, and OpenAI killed Sora six months after launch without a dollar of its billion-dollar Disney deal ever changing hands.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-25-2026/

Judge Rita Lin questioned why the Pentagon went far beyond ending a vendor relationship with Anthropic, pressing the government's attorney on directives that carry no legal authority and technical claims about system modification that the government couldn't substantiate - a ruling expected within days will shape how intelligence systems participate in state power. Arm revealed its first self-produced chip, the AGI CPU built on TSMC 3nm for agentic AI inference with Meta as lead customer and co-developer alongside OpenAI and Cerebras, marking the moment a company whose architecture already powers three devices per human on Earth entered direct silicon competition. OpenAI shut down Sora abruptly after the video platform peaked at 3.3 million downloads and declined to 1.1 million, with the billion-dollar Disney deal dissolving without money ever changing hands as the company consolidates around capabilities that compound. Five U.S. states are weighing legislation to overturn decades-old nuclear power bans as electricity demand from data centers outpaces what wind and solar alone can deliver. Baltimore filed suit against xAI alleging Grok generated nonconsensual sexualized imagery including of children, while a New Mexico jury ordered Meta to pay $375 million for enabling child exploitation - courts drawing lines around what intelligence systems and platforms can produce. Baylor College of Medicine discovered that metformin operates through a brain pathway at doses thousands of times lower than oral treatment, reframing understanding of a drug taken daily by hundreds of millions of people for sixty years.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-25-2026/
